hero_title: Control multiple stores from a single cockpit.
hero_subtitle: Orders, teams, brands, warehouses, ads, profits: one global vision to lead your e-commerce empire.
chaos_description: The more you grow, the more chaos sets in. Without a centralized structure, the empire collapses from within.
group_vision: A group view, without losing the detail
zoom_description: RiseManager's power lies in its ability to zoom in on a specific order or zoom out to the entire empire in one click.
dashboard_desc: All your commercial, logistical, and financial units unified in a lightning-fast cockpit.
everyone_sees: Everyone sees what they need to see
hierarchy_desc: Protect your trade secrets. RiseManager implements a granular hierarchy so each team member is focused on their role.
executive_alerts: The boss gets the real alerts
automation_desc: Stop looking for information; it comes to you. RiseManager filters the noise to present only the events impacting your profitability.
security_desc: Your data is your greatest asset. We treat it as such, with an architecture designed for maximum security and limitless scalability.
pricing_desc: No hidden fees, just a solution tailored for your growth.
ready_for_empire: Ready to go to Empire level?
lead_form_desc: Leave us your contact details and an expert will contact you within 24 hours for a personalized demo adapted to your structure.
donnees_dispersées: Navigating between 5 different tabs to understand your global revenue is a strategic waste of time.
managers_sans_vision: Your team managers don't have access to the KPIs they need to act autonomously.
reporting_lent: By the time you compile the numbers, the opportunity is already gone. You're driving with the rearview mirror.
pertes_invisibles: Stock errors or profit drops go unnoticed until it's too late.
equipes_cloisonnées: The Call Center doesn't know what Media Buyers are doing. Information doesn't flow.
patron_saturé: You become the bottleneck as every operational decision must go through you.
multi_boutiques: Centralize Shopify, WooCommerce and your custom stores on a single screen.
multi_utilisateurs: Manage dozens of employees with dedicated and secure workspaces.
multi_entrepots: Real-time visibility of stocks across multiple geographic zones.
permissions_avancees: Precisely control who sees what. Protect your sensitive data.
reporting_consolide: Automatic dashboards for the group, by brand or by employee.
alertes_intelligentes: Push notifications for critical anomalies requiring your immediate attention.
authentification_multifactor: Multi-factor authentication (2FA) and detailed access logs.
chaque_modification_tracee: Every modification is tracked. Who did what, when.
donnees_protegees: Data protected by 256-bit encryption. No spam guaranteed.
real_time_stream: Real-time data stream for your enterprise group.
empire_sync_desc: All 12 stores are currently synchronized across 4 regions.
faq_q1: How many stores can we connect?
faq_a1: In the Enterprise version, there is no technical limit.
faq_q2: Can we separate teams by store?
faq_a2: Absolutely. You can assign specific team members to each store.
faq_a3: Yes, we offer a complete REST API.
faq_a4: Yes, the solution can be customized to your image with your own branding.
faq_a5: Yes, an account manager and a dedicated support team are assigned to each Enterprise client.
faq_a6: Absolutely. We offer complete support during migration with a dedicated technical team.
test_title: They are building the future of COD in Africa with us.
test_quote1: We run 5 stores with a single central team. RiseManager allowed us to reduce our operational costs by 40% while doubling our volume.
test_quote2: Meetings have become useful. We're no longer there to discuss numbers (they're right before our eyes), but to decide on the weekly strategy.
test_quote3: We finally see where to act every morning. The alert center has become our first reflex. No more invisible stock errors.
partner_growth: We don't look for clients, but growth partners. RiseManager Enterprise is an elite solution for elite operators.
footer_desc: The strategic command center for modern e-commerce empires. Power, control, and scalability.
